violations.text: The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. New Violation. Correct By: 01/18/2024

Prep sink located in basement is lacking a proper air gap. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 02/01/2024
